resources.string: A cross-brand charging control app. On supported phones it can toggle bypass charging or charge limits from inside Charge Pilot, with OEM screens kept as fallback.
No telemetry, no cloud sync, and no background privileged actions. Operation history is stored locally on this device only.
Manual OEM settings are always preferred when available.
App control only appears when a matching strategy is installed and available.
Settings writes are reversible from Home or the OEM settings page.
Play builds keep non-privileged routes and fallback navigation. Full builds add Shizuku/root modules for ROMs that block normal writes; Samsung S24 Ultra app control uses Shizuku, not root.
Open source under AGPL-3.0. Brand entries come from the bundled registry and include evidence labels and verified dates where available.
